statement.en: Constructing law and economics : legal thought, social struggle, and the reproduction of American capitalism, 1945-1980
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The submission is an embargoed thesis with no accessible abstract content. Truth-value evaluation is impossible due to absence of evaluable claim content. The document exists but its propositional content is observation-impossible within the evaluation frame.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 法律と資本が社会闘争を通じて自らを再構成する、その必然性が見える。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 法（紫）と資本（青）が下の基盤と相互作用し、社会闘争（黄）が重力の線として流れ落ちる構造。
